articles.title: Injured hiker rescued from White Mountains via helicopter
articles.description:
“Due to the remote location, and in order to avoid a strenuous carryout, the NH Army National Guard was contacted to determine if they were available to assist with a helicopter extraction,” officials said.

The post Injured hiker rescued from White Mountains via helicopter appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NH Army National Guard rescued an injured hiker from the White Mountains on May 31.
Helicopter extraction was necessary due to the remote location of the incident.
Local hikers should be aware of potential rescue services available in emergencies.

articles.title: Newark mayor imposes curfew around immigration detention center after clashes between police, protesters
articles.description:
One video posted on social media showed police on horseback marching into crowds attempting to break up protesters.

The post Newark mayor imposes curfew around immigration detention center after clashes between police, protesters appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Newark mayor imposes curfew around immigration detention center following violent protests.
Police used horseback units to disperse crowds during the clashes.
Boston residents may see increased tensions regarding immigration policies and local protests.

articles.title: State trooper hospitalized after crash with alleged wrong-way driver in Peabody
articles.description:
The Newburyport man who allegedly struck the state trooper is also facing a charge of operating under the influence.

The post State trooper hospitalized after crash with alleged wrong-way driver in Peabody appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: State trooper hospitalized after collision with wrong-way driver in Peabody.
Newburyport man charged with operating under the influence following the incident.
Local residents urged to drive cautiously to prevent similar accidents.

articles.title: ‘A surreal experience’: Readers react to loud boom in Mass. caused by meteor
articles.description:
The sonic boom was heard Saturday afternoon through Greater Boston and beyond, prompting lots of theories from confused residents.

The post ‘A surreal experience’: Readers react to loud boom in Mass. caused by meteor appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Residents across Greater Boston heard a loud sonic boom on Saturday afternoon.
The boom was caused by a meteor, surprising many locals with its intensity.
Authorities confirmed the event, alleviating fears of an explosion or other dangers.
